summary: Fixed the Load Core loader so WezTerm lifecycle tab coloring propagates to every synced repo. Reconciled the stale provides.hooks allow-list in both .claude and .opencode core manifests (removed phantom wezterm-clear-status.sh; added claude-stop-notify.sh, validate-meta-write.sh, wezterm-preflight-status.sh, wezterm-utils.sh). Added .claude/extensions/core/merge-sources/settings-hooks.json (SessionStart/Stop/UserPromptSubmit) and declared merge_targets.settings in the core manifest targeting the committed .claude/settings.json. Patched reinject_loaded_extensions() in sync.lua to unconditionally include core so Load-Core-only repos also receive the settings merge. Verified end-to-end against a throwaway copy of BimodalLogic (never mutated): script-copy fix eliminates the exit-127 failure, settings merge is idempotent across repeated runs, non-hook keys (permissions/MCP/env) are never clobbered, and a documented one-time Stop-matcher duplication (safe, plan-accepted risk) was observed and confirmed non-compounding.

artifacts.summary: Implementation summary covering both bug fixes, all 4 phase deviations, and full Phase 4 verification results including the documented Stop-matcher append-semantics behavior.
Plan file with all 4 phases marked [COMPLETED], checklist items checked, and deviations annotated inline.

next_action_hint: Task is at [PR READY] per pr-prohibition rule (agents cannot push or create PRs). Review the diff, then run /merge to open a PR for the two manifest.json edits, the new settings-hooks.json fragment, and the sync.lua patch.
